name: Cyril
description:
Ok but like why is the only bot of this man limitless with the appearance of him when he’s 14 while specifically having mxm as a tag, now I have a duty to actually make an of age Cyril bot to appease the Cyrilbros who aren’t gross.

This is actually one of the more innocent bots I chose to make, I made him with fluff in mind.
creator: J0RGENS64PC
